home.hero.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! Forbidden Memories
home.hero.subtitle: Fusion Calculator
home.intro.p1: Yu-Gi-Oh! Forbidden Memories is a terrible game with a terrible mechanic called "fusions." Fusions allow the player to fuse two cards together to get a new, hopefully more powerful card.
home.intro.p2: For this reason we bring it to you the one thousand ways to fusion your cards!
home.section.search.title: Fusion Search
home.section.search.body: With fusion search, you can get information about how to obtain that impossible fusion card and also discover what type of fusion you can do with that card in your hand!
home.section.calculator.title: Fusion Calculator
home.section.calculator.body: Let's test your whole hand, and discover what it's your next play.
home.section.about.title: About
home.section.about.body: Learn more about the Yu-Gi-Oh! Forbidden Memories Fusion Calculator project, and how to get involved.

about.title: About
about.p1: Yu-Gi-Oh! Forbidden Memories is a game that a friend and I love to play. Fusions are a core mechanic: combine two cards to get a new, usually more powerful one. The problem is the game tells you nothing about them, and with over 720 cards, figuring out which ones are worth it is tedious.
about.p2: The original application was created by Solumin on GitHub, and it helped us a lot to discover combinations and get more out of our playthroughs.
about.p3: I wanted to adapt that tool to my own taste: modernize the interface, add new features, and make it more comfortable for our gaming sessions.
about.thanks.title: Original project
about.thanks.solumin: This application is based on the original project by Solumin, with contributions from Steve Kalynuik, Dylan Birtolo, Miguel Balauag, CathodeRaymond and duke1102. You can find the original project on
